message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -796,7 +796,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.3.6","title":"C6: Canonical fixture-root unification and corpus cardinality gate","description":"Unify conformance fixture sourcing so every parity/conformance runner reads one canonical fixture-root manifest with hash-locked inputs and category coverage floors. This closes trust gaps where different fixture roots or empty roots can produce misleadingly green runs.","acceptance_criteria":"1) A canonical fixture-root manifest is the sole source for all conformance/differential runners, with explicit path aliases and stable content hashes.
2) CI hard-fails when fixture roots are empty, misaligned, or missing required category families; failures include first-failure diagnostics and affected manifest entries.
3) Cardinality floors are versioned and machine-enforced per feature family (core SQL, DDL/DML, pragmas, functions, extensions, concurrency/error paths).
4) Differential runner outputs, coverage accounting, release gates, and user-facing status reports reference the same manifest hash so evidence is cross-consistent.

Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with trace_id, run_id, scenario_id, seed, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MaroonBasin","created_at":"2026-02-26T07:36:27.364580340Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T23:28:38.925426826Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["corpus","fixtures","parity-cert","track-c"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4","title":"Track D: Engine and Runtime Surface Closure","description":"Close actual engine/runtime gaps (NotImplemented/stubs/default backend mismatches) that block behavioral parity in the supported surface.","acceptance_criteria":"1. All in-scope NotImplemented/stub paths are either implemented or explicitly excluded with rationale.
2. Backend/runtime behavior matches declared parity surface.
3. Deterministic regression tests cover each previously missing behavior.
4. No concurrency-default regressions (BEGIN -> BEGIN CONCURRENT remains default-on).
Child quality gate contract:
- Every child task must satisfy the cross-cutting quality contract for unit/property tests, deterministic e2e replay, structured logging schema validation, and evidence bundles.
- Epic cannot be closed while any child lacks reproducible test/log evidence.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","estimated_minutes":1800,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:51:43.106758841Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T07:42:20.315450194Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["core-sql","engine","parity-cert","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","title":"D1: Inventory and classify all NotImplemented/stub runtime paths","description":"Create exhaustive catalog of NotImplemented/placeholder paths with severity, feature mapping, and closure strategy (implement vs explicit exclusion).","acceptance_criteria":"1) Inventory is complete and machine-readable, including `file:line`, feature_id, owner, severity, and closure strategy.
2) Every item maps to feature ids and owners.
3) No uncategorized parity-critical stubs remain.
4) CI fails on any newly introduced uncategorized parity-critical stub.

Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with `trace_id`, `run_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"Investigation snapshot (2026-02-26): parity-critical stub inventory with exact locations.

Core connection/runtime NotImplemented paths:
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:2141 -> VACUUM INTO not implemented.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:2202 -> INSERT ... SELECT fallback rejects WITH/UPSERT/RETURNING.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:3733 -> CREATE TABLE ... AS SELECT ... STRICT not supported.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:3823 -> CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE only allows fts5 in this path.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:6768,6788,6802,6808,6991,7578 -> GROUP BY/JOIN fallback rejects compounds/windows/non-table sources/star and some join sources.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:11026-11042 -> expression-only SELECT path rejects FROM/GROUP BY/HAVING/WINDOW.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:12383,12388 -> IN (SELECT ...) and IN table_name rejected in expression emitter path.

Planner/VDBE constraints mapped as parity stubs:
- crates/fsqlite-planner/src/codegen.rs:207,434,732,741,1119 -> narrowed WHERE/UPDATE/DEFAULT VALUES/expression support.
- crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/codegen.rs:538,599,2015,2134,2150,3003 -> IN rewrite prerequisite, non-table source rejection, GROUP BY aggregate constraints.
- crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/engine.rs:3036 -> TODO collation handling in Opcode::Compare.

Parser/extensions scan result:
- No direct TODO/unimplemented/NotImplemented markers found in crates/fsqlite-parser/src.
- No direct TODO/unimplemented/NotImplemented markers found in crates/fsqlite-ext-*.

Rationale: these locations are concrete parity blockers for declared SQL/extension surface and should be tracked as feature-ids with closure strategy (implement vs explicit exclusion).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"NavyCompass","estimated_minutes":240,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:07.115722512Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T18:27:45.576090229Z","closed_at":"2026-02-26T18:27:45.576065402Z","close_reason":"Implemented runtime stub inventory + gate artifacts; cargo validation blocked by pre-existing fsqlite-btree parse corruption","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["gap-inventory","parity-cert","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","title":"D2: Close core SQL execution gaps (parser/planner/vdbe/core)","description":"Implement missing core SQL behavior required by supported parity surface and back with deterministic differential tests.","acceptance_criteria":"1) In-scope SQL gap list reaches zero unresolved items. 2) New tests cover happy/boundary/error behavior. 3) No new unsupported regressions introduced.
Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with `trace_id`, `run_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"2026-02-28 progress (CloudyBridge) slice 4: Implemented UPDATE/DELETE ORDER BY+LIMIT target-row materialization in core dispatch. Added helper path in connection.rs to select deterministic key set (rowid/IPK fallback) using original WHERE/ORDER/LIMIT, rewrite effective statement WHERE to key IN (...) and clear ORDER/LIMIT before VDBE compile, so VDBE no longer silently ignores target subset. Updated UPDATE/DELETE dispatch to use effective statements for trigger snapshots, affected-row accounting, and compile execution. Strengthened/added regression tests: test_update_alias_order_by_limit_without_where_uses_alias_in_internal_count_query, test_delete_alias_order_by_limit_without_where_uses_alias_in_internal_count_query, test_update_order_by_limit_offset_targets_expected_row, test_delete_order_by_limit_offset_targets_expected_rows. Validation via rch (target-codex-cloudybridge): cargo fmt --check PASS; cargo test -p fsqlite-core order_by_limit -- --nocapture PASS; cargo test -p fsqlite-core insert_select_without_from -- --nocapture PASS; cargo check --workspace --all-targets PASS; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings PASS.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CloudyBridge","estimated_minutes":900,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:10.763355459Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T09:00:50.513448729Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","sql-surface","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-13cyp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1ld4f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-thqgm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","title":"D2: Close core SQL execution gaps (parser/planner/vdbe/core)","description":"Implement missing core SQL behavior required by supported parity surface and back with deterministic differential tests.","acceptance_criteria":"1) In-scope SQL gap list reaches zero unresolved items. 2) New tests cover happy/boundary/error behavior. 3) No new unsupported regressions introduced.
Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with `trace_id`, `run_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"2026-02-28 Codex slice: Added defensive VDBE codegen guards in crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/codegen.rs to reject unsupported UPDATE ... FROM and raw UPDATE/DELETE ORDER BY/LIMIT/OFFSET paths unless pre-materialized by connection layer. Added targeted tests: test_codegen_update_rejects_from_clause_in_vdbe_path, test_codegen_update_rejects_unmaterialized_order_by_limit, test_codegen_delete_rejects_unmaterialized_order_by_limit. During validation, resolved compile-surface drift from new AST time_travel field by adding time_travel: None in affected VDBE test constructors (codegen.rs + engine.rs). Targeted validation via rch passed: cargo test -p fsqlite-vdbe test_codegen_update_rejects_from_clause_in_vdbe_path -- --nocapture; cargo test -p fsqlite-vdbe rejects_ -- --nocapture (new tests passed). Formatting fixed via rch cargo fmt --all and verified with cargo fmt --all --check. Workspace-wide cargo check currently blocked by pre-existing unrelated compile errors in current branch (e.g., codegen.rs Expr::IsNull/IsNotNull pattern mismatch at line ~2592, Box<Expr> compare mismatch at ~2524 and ~4894, engine.rs references self.schemas/c.name inconsistent with StorageCursor struct) under rch cargo check --workspace --all-targets.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CloudyBridge","estimated_minutes":900,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:10.763355459Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T22:34:08.671109481Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","sql-surface","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-13cyp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1ld4f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-thqgm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","title":"D3: Align transaction/savepoint/pragma semantics with oracle","description":"Close semantic mismatches in transaction modes, savepoints, and pragma behaviors against oracle expectations.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Transaction semantic matrix is diff-clean for supported cases. 2) Busy/retry/error codes are verified. 3) Structured traces aid first-failure diagnosis.
Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with `trace_id`, `run_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"Claimed by PlumWolf at 2026-02-27T01:09Z; starting semantic gap triage and targeted fixes with rch-only validation.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PlumWolf","estimated_minutes":420,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:14.225869924Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:09:30.769964041Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","pragma","track-d","txn"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","title":"D4: Wire default runtime path to declared storage architecture safely","description":"Reconcile README target architecture with actual default runtime wiring so parity-critical persistence behavior is tested on real path.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Parity-cert runtime path is hard-bound to the real Pager/WAL/MVCC/B-Tree backend by default; any MemDatabase fallback in certifying mode is a hard failure.
2) Default wiring proof includes deterministic end-to-end scenarios that exercise connection open, transaction begin/commit/rollback, restart recovery, and concurrent write/read workloads on file-backed storage.
3) BEGIN default behavior remains concurrent-mode ON across core and e2e harness settings, with anti-regression tests for connection/e2e/fairness defaults.
4) Differential parity runs include backend-identity metadata and first-failure diagnostics proving results were produced on real storage wiring, with one-command replay artifacts.

Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with trace_id, run_id, scenario_id, seed, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":720,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:17.869755743Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T08:07:08.390775912Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","storage-wiring","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-zjisk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-zjisk.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.5","title":"D5: Align runtime architecture docs/comments with actual default storage wiring","description":"Update stale runtime documentation to match current fsqlite-core behavior where pager/WAL/B-tree wiring is active by default while MemDatabase remains as execution image/fallback in limited paths. Scope: README Current Implementation Status section and top-level comments in crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs. Preserve concurrent-writer defaults and avoid behavior changes.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AmberBrook","created_at":"2026-02-28T03:46:54.784837778Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T03:55:50.285840550Z","closed_at":"2026-02-28T03:55:50.285821223Z","close_reason":"Completed scoped docs/comment alignment with validation evidence","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-28T03:46:54.784837778Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1838,"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed docs/comment alignment for runtime wiring reality. Updated README Current Implementation Status to reflect hybrid runtime: pager/WAL/B-tree default path active, MemDatabase retained as execution image/fallback. Updated crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs module/struct/field docs to remove stale 'future wiring only' wording and describe current default execution path accurately. Validation (rch-offloaded): rch exec -- cargo check -p fsqlite-core --all-targets => PASS. rch exec -- cargo fmt --check => FAIL due unrelated pre-existing formatting diffs across multiple files in workspace.","created_at":"2026-02-28T03:55:49Z"}]}
